sanskrit:
इदमद्य मया लब्धमिमं प्राप्स्ये मनोरथम्।
इदमस्तीदमपि मे भविष्यति पुनर्धनम्।।
transliteration: idam adya mayā labdham imaṃ prāpsye manoratham / idam astīdam api me bhaviṣyati punar dhanam //
literal_meaning: This today by me is gained; this desired object I shall obtain; this is mine now and this also will again become my wealth.
contextual_meaning: A grandiose, compulsive accumulation schema: the mind fuses present possession, future acquisition, and eternal ownership into one addictive loop, producing an illusion of omnipotent control over time and resources.
psychological_state: Narcissistic inflation with compulsive hoarding; the ego uses future fantasy to numb inner void, creating a defensive shell against existential powerlessness.
trigger_scenario: Checking your brokerage app every few minutes, mentally adding unvested stock to your net-worth and already planning the next purchase to stay ahead of peers.
anchor_text: Possessions never truly belong to you; clinging breeds endless craving.
